_comment: Central eval config. Mirrors the teva-kb-trace app settings so the harness scores against the SAME thresholds the agent uses in production. Secrets (TOOL_API_KEY, AZURE_OPENAI_KEY) are read from ENV, never stored here. Scaling 8->200 docs changes NOTHING in this file unless you deliberately retune thresholds.

gates._comment: CI regression gate. run_all.py exits non-zero if any actual metric falls below its target. Tune as the corpus grows; these are starting targets for the 8-doc baseline.
